spec.expr: sum by(containerName, probeType) (count_over_time({job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "Probe failed" | logfmt | containerName=~"$service" [$__auto]))

spec.description: Readiness and liveness probe failures grouped by parsed kubelet containerName and probeType.
spec.title: Kubelet probe failures by service

spec.expr: sum by(pod, probeType) (count_over_time({job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "Probe failed" | logfmt | containerName=~"$service" [$__auto]))

spec.description: Readiness and liveness probe failures grouped by pod and probeType.
spec.title: Kubelet probe failures by pod

spec.expr: sum by(instance, probeType) (count_over_time({job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "Probe failed" | logfmt | containerName=~"$service" [$__auto]))

spec.description: Readiness and liveness probe failures grouped by node instance and probeType.
spec.title: Kubelet probe failures by node

spec.expr: sum by(containerName, pod, probeType, instance) (count_over_time({job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "Probe failed" | logfmt | containerName=~"$service" [$__auto]))

spec.description: Full grouping for RCA: service, pod, probe type, and node/instance.
spec.title: Kubelet probe failures service / pod / node

spec.expr: {job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "Probe failed" | logfmt | containerName=~"$service"

spec.description: Raw kubelet probe-failure log lines with parsed fields exposed in log details.
spec.title: Kubelet probe failure details

spec.description: User-action event volume by stable action name. Sudden drops highlight missing instrumentation or broken flows; spikes identify behavior shifts.
spec.title: Faro user action volume by action

spec.expr: quantile_over_time(0.95, {app_id="464", kind="event"} |= "event_name=faro.user.action" | logfmt | unwrap event_data_userActionDuration [$__auto]) by (action_name)

spec.description: P95 frontend action duration by action_name from event_data_userActionDuration.
spec.title: Faro user action p95 duration

spec.description: Critical/high user actions by action_name and importance. Checkout and account-save should stay visible during tests.
spec.title: Critical and high importance actions

spec.expr: sum by(event_data_region, event_data_locale, event_data_language) (count_over_time({app_id="464", kind="event"} |= "event_name=faro.user.action" | logfmt [$__auto]))

spec.description: Regional and localization mix for user actions, useful for detecting missing region/language coverage.
spec.title: User actions by region and locale

spec.description: Focused cart, checkout, and account-save action volume for shopping behavior anomalies.
spec.title: Cart and checkout action volume

spec.description: Frontend exception/error/event signals from Faro, grouped by level.
spec.title: Frontend exception and error signals

spec.description: Raw Faro user action events with parsed region, locale, account, browser, and session fields exposed in log details.
spec.title: Recent Faro user action details

spec.description:
Current health snapshot across services and cluster.

[→ View k8s details](/d/ensemble-red-log-signals?dtab=k8s)
spec.title: Service & Cluster Health

spec.description: CPU nanoseconds consumed over time, grouped by container
spec.title: CPU time by service

spec.description: Aggregated CPU flamegraph across all selected services
spec.title: CPU flamegraph

spec.description: Bytes allocated in new TLABs over time, grouped by container
spec.title: Memory allocation rate by service

spec.description: Aggregated memory allocation flamegraph across all selected services
spec.title: Memory allocation flamegraph

spec.description: Objects allocated in new TLABs over time, grouped by container
spec.title: Object allocation rate by service

spec.expr: sum by (container) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", container=~"$service", container!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (container) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", resource="cpu", container=~"$service"})

sum by (container) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", container=~"$service", container!=""}) / sum by (container) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", resource="memory", container=~"$service"})

spec.description: Pods whose last container termination was OOMKilled, Error, or another failure reason — primary root-cause signal for unhealthy pod counts
spec.title: Container termination reasons

spec.expr: sum by (container, namespace) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", container=~"$service"}[$__rate_interval])) * on(container, namespace) group_left(reason) (max by (container, namespace, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{reason="OOMKilled"} == 1))

sum by (container, namespace) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace=~"ensemble-.*", container=~"$service"}[$__rate_interval])) * on(container, namespace) group_left(reason) (max by (container, namespace, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{reason!="OOMKilled", reason!="Completed"} == 1))

spec.description: OOMKill events over time — spikes indicate memory pressure causing pod restarts
spec.title: OOMKills & termination events over time

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "ContainerStatus from runtime service failed" [$__range]))

spec.description: K8s journal event health snapshot — total events, errors, probe failures, and container runtime issues.
spec.title: K8s Event Health

spec.description: Log event volume over time broken down by severity level and systemd unit
spec.title: Event Volume by Level & Unit

spec.description: Kubelet error log lines (starting with E) over time by unit
spec.title: Error Rate Over Time

spec.description: Kubelet log lines containing error, warning, failed, evict, OOM, backoff, or crash keywords
spec.title: Kubelet Errors

spec.description: Readiness and liveness probe failures reported by kubelet
spec.title: Readiness / Liveness Probe Failures

spec.expr: {job="integrations/kubernetes/journal", k8s_cluster_name="ensemble-grafana", unit="kubelet.service", instance=~"$instance"} |= "ContainerStatus from runtime service failed"

spec.description: ContainerStatus errors from the container runtime (containerd)
spec.title: Container Runtime Errors (Runtime)
